content: This is a reconstructed statement from the personal diary of Ramesh Das, recovered from his residence after his death on 18/07/2021. Entry dated 15/04/2020: 'Mutation application filed by Priya Chatterjee on forged will. Paper from 2015 batch. Ink from Parker pen bought in March 2017. Signature traced. Notary seal is fake — firm closed in 2016. Debashish Mukherjee altered 2016 record — digital trace shows edit on 04/04/2019. Nandini Sen was on leave. Mrs. Ghosh hospitalized. Bank withdrawal to shell company. This is fraud. I will report to CBI tomorrow. If anything happens to me — it’s Priya.'
